process.commandLine: for port in 8080 9090; do python3 -c "import socket; s=socket.socket(socket.AF_INET,socket.SOCK_STREAM); s.setsockopt(socket.SOL_SOCKET,socket.SO_REUSEADDR,1); s.bind(('0.0.0.0',$port)); s.close(); print('bound tcp', $port)" || { echo bind failed for $port >&2; exit 1; }; done; echo PORT_MAPPING_MULTI_OK
